description: Workflow manifest for Honeycomb EHR. Edit this file to enable/disable workflow packages.

workflows.comment: Set enabled:true for local dev, or use EXTRA_WORKFLOWS env var
WASM biological signal simulation engine for space health
PDF document parser with AI-powered FHIR resource extraction
Hexagonal grid visualization — modernized from react-hexgrid by Hellenic (MIT)
TRaCSS space-traffic data to FHIR R4 — staging queue, transform worker, /tracss-monitor
Griffin Mission One (Astrobotic / Voyager Technologies) mission-operations module
Lunar surface maps (Google planetary tiles + Cesium 3D) - migrated from packages/lunar-maps
Artemis II life-support simulator (ECLSS, consumables, UWPS, greenhouse) - migrated from packages/life-support-systems
Pantry inventory + calorie calculator (Artemis/orbital) - migrated from packages/pantry-management
ECG vital signs + DICOM waveform viewer (orbital gate) - migrated from packages/ecg
Symptom assessment + smoking status (orbital gate) - migrated from packages/symptom-tracking
Orbital space-program management (vehicles, missions, daily log, space weather) - migrated from packages/orbital
Email subscription list with verify/unsubscribe flow - migrated from packages/email-list
Syndromic surveillance / ONC 170.315(f)(2) - migrated from packages/syndromic-surveillance
Phenotype domains + dermatome visualizations (client-only) - migrated from packages/personal-characteristics
Family health history / ONC 170.315(a)(12) - migrated from packages/family-health-history
Electronic case reporting / ONC 170.315(f)(5) - migrated from packages/case-reporting
SDOH screening / ONC 170.315(a)(15) - migrated from packages/social-determinants
Lab test reporting / ONC 170.315(f)(3) - migrated from packages/lab-test-reporting
Cancer registry reporting / ONC 170.315(f)(4) - migrated from packages/cancer-registry-reporting
Antimicrobial use/resistance reporting / ONC 170.315(f)(6) - migrated from packages/antimicrobial-reporting
Immunization registry reporting / ONC 170.315(f)(1) - migrated from packages/immunization-registry
Drug formulary / ONC 170.315(a)(10) - migrated from packages/drug-formulary
Drug-drug/drug-allergy interaction checks / ONC 170.315(a)(4) - migrated from packages/drug-interactions
Secure messaging / Direct Project / ONC 170.315(e)(2)+(h)(1) - migrated from packages/secure-messaging
Electronic prescribing (NCPDP SCRIPT) / ONC 170.315(b)(3) - migrated from packages/e-prescribing
Multi-factor auth (TOTP) / ONC 170.315(d)(13) - migrated from packages/multi-factor-auth
Implantable device registry / ONC 170.315(g)(7) - migrated from packages/implantable-devices
Problem/medication/allergy lists / ONC 170.315(a)(6-8) - migrated from packages/clinical-lists
Checklist / protocol management - migrated from packages/checklist-manifesto
Subscription tiers / Stripe payments / feature gating - migrated from packages/monetization
Synthea synthetic data configuration - migrated from packages/synthea
CPOE order catalog / ONC 170.315(a)(1-3) - migrated from packages/order-catalog
Leaderboard starter (SMART on FHIR demo) - migrated from packages/leaderboard-starter
Patient chart starter (SMART on FHIR demo) - migrated from packages/patient-chart-starter
